_doc: FR-4.3 census-seeded brand normalization (EC-16, docs/specs/pdp-full-content). Seeded from the 2026-07-19 prod census (999 distinct (shop_name, brand) pairs: SELECT shop_name, brand, count(*) FROM deals GROUP BY 1,2). `map` lists every polluted alias observed — matched by brand-normalize.cjs as the WHOLE value, case-insensitively; no substring/token heuristics, unknown values pass through unchanged (a heuristic can't tell 'Welax DE' (polluted) from 'Don Dandrea Deutschland AG' (a legal name)). `exceptions` are values that pattern-match pollution (DE/EU suffix, country word, lowercase styling, shop-name echo) but are verified-legit distinct brands — never map these. Corporate manufacturer names carrying a legal-form token (GmbH, AG, KG, e.K., e.U., Inc.) — the entire Aliva Apotheke catalog — are legit by construction and belong in neither list. Re-run the census after onboarding a new advertiser and extend the map.
